IT SECURITY NEWS HEADLINES
Predictions 2023: Big Tech's Coming Security Shopping Spree
Zoho Urges ManageEngine Users to Patch Serious SQL Injection Vulnerability
16 Car Makers and Their Vehicles Hacked via Telematics, APIs, Infrastructure
Burger Chain Five Guys Discloses Data Breach Impacting Job Applicants
Slack Says Hackers Stole Private Source Code Repositories
MORE SECURITY HEADLINES
Database Containing 235 Million Twitter User Records Available for Free
A database containing 235 million unique records of Twitter users is now available for free on the web. [Read More]
Play Ransomware Group Used New Exploitation Method in Rackspace Attack
The recent ransomware attack targeting Rackspace was conducted by the Play group using a new exploitation method named OWASSRF. [Read More]
Meta Hit With 390 Million Euro Fine Over EU Data Breaches
Meta was slapped with fines totaling 390 million euros ($413 million) for breaching EU personal data laws on Facebook and Instagram. [Read More]
Android's First Security Updates for 2023 Patch 60 Vulnerabilities
Google this week announced the first security updates for Android for 2023, which resolve a total of 60 vulnerabilities. [Read More]
NIST Finalizes Cybersecurity Guidance for Ground Segment of Space Operations
NIST has released the final version of its guidance on applying the Cybersecurity Framework to the ground segment of space operations, specifically satellite command and control. [Read More]
Wabtec Says Personal Information Compromised in Ransomware Attack
Rail company Wabtec has confirmed that personal information was stolen in a ransomware attack last year. [Read More]
High-Severity Command Injection Flaws Found in Fortinet's FortiTester, FortiADC
Fortinet has released patches for multiple vulnerabilities across its product portfolio and warned of a high-severity command injection bug in FortiADC. [Read More]
Hacker Selling Data Allegedly Stolen From Volvo Cars Following Ransomware Attack
A hacker is offering to sell data allegedly stolen from Volvo Cars following an Endurance ransomware attack. [Read More]
Researcher Says Google Paid $100k Bug Bounty for Smart Speaker Vulnerabilities
Security researcher Matt Kunze says he received a $107,500 bug bounty reward for Google Home smart speaker vulnerabilities. [Read More]
Critical Vulnerabilities Patched in Synology Routers
Synology has patched several critical vulnerabilities in its routers, including flaws likely exploited recently at the Pwn2Own hacking contest. [Read More]
